name: external
title: GCP Load Balancer — Global External HTTP(S) LB
summary: Creates the full global external L7 chain: global static IP → HTTP/HTTPS forwarding rules → target proxies → URL map (host/path routing) → backend services (with CDN and Cloud Armor attachment) → health checks, plus an optional Google-managed SSL certificate.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional labels merged beneath the mandatory label set (lowercased).

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID hosting the load balancer.

module.name: backend_services
module.type: map(object({ protocol = optional(string, "HTTP") port_name = optional(string, "http") timeout_sec = optional(number, 30) enable_cdn = optional(bool, false) security_policy_id = optional(string) groups = map(object({ group = string balancing_mode = optional(string, "UTILIZATION") capacity_scaler = optional(number, 1.0) max_utilization = optional(number, 0.8) })) health_check = object({ port = number protocol = optional(string, "HTTP") request_path = optional(string, "/") check_interval_sec = optional(number, 5) timeout_sec = optional(number, 5) healthy_threshold = optional(number, 2) unhealthy_threshold = optional(number, 2) }) }))
module.description: Global backend services keyed by logical name, each with backend groups and a health check. Attach a Cloud Armor policy via security_policy_id.

module.name: default_backend_service_key
module.description: Logical key of the backend service receiving unmatched traffic (URL map default).

module.name: host_rules
module.type: map(object({ hosts = list(string) backend_service_key = string path_rules = optional(map(object({ paths = list(string) backend_service_key = string })), {}) }))
module.description: Host-based routing rules keyed by logical name, with optional path rules per host.

module.name: enable_https
module.description: Create an HTTPS frontend (managed or self-managed certs required).

module.name: managed_certificate_domains
module.description: Domains for a Google-managed SSL certificate. Certificate activates only after DNS resolves to the LB IP.

module.name: ssl_certificate_ids
module.description: Existing SSL certificate self-links to attach instead of (or alongside) the managed certificate.

module.name: enable_http
module.description: Create an HTTP (port 80) frontend. Commonly kept on for redirect-to-HTTPS handled at the application.

module.name: static_ip_name
module.description: Name for the module-managed global static IP. Null derives the name from the framework naming convention.

outputs.name: lb_id
outputs.description: ID of the URL map (the routing core of the global external LB).

outputs.name: lb_address
outputs.description: Global anycast IP address of the load balancer. Point DNS here (managed certificates activate only after DNS resolves to this IP).

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map of frontend forwarding rules: keys 'https' and/or 'http' to forwarding rule IDs.

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical backend service name to backend service ID.

outputs.name: managed_certificate_id
outputs.description: ID of the Google-managed SSL certificate, or null when not created.
